auth.label: API Key
auth.description: ElevenLabs API key sent with the xi-api-key header. Create or manage keys from Developers > API Keys.

actions.name: create_sound_effect
actions.description: Generate a sound effect from a text prompt and upload the binary audio result to connector transit storage.

text.description: The prompt text that will be converted into a sound effect.

outputFormat.description: The output audio format for generated sound effects.

loop.description: Whether to create a smoothly looping sound effect.

durationSeconds.description: The generated sound duration in seconds.

promptInfluence.description: How strongly the generation should follow the prompt.

modelId.description: The ElevenLabs sound generation model ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the uploaded file.

downloadUrl.description: The local transit URL for downloading the uploaded file.

sizeBytes.description: The uploaded file size in bytes.

file.description: A downloadable file uploaded to local transit storage.

contentType.description: The response content type from ElevenLabs.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: delete_history_item
actions.description: Delete one ElevenLabs history item by history item ID.

historyItemId.description: The history item ID to delete.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

status.description: The deletion status returned by ElevenLabs.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_audio_from_history_item
actions.description: Download the audio for one ElevenLabs history item and upload the binary result to connector transit storage.

historyItemId.description: The history item ID whose audio should be downloaded.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the uploaded file.

downloadUrl.description: The local transit URL for downloading the uploaded file.

sizeBytes.description: The uploaded file size in bytes.

file.description: A downloadable file uploaded to local transit storage.

historyItemId.description: The history item ID that was downloaded.

contentType.description: The response content type from ElevenLabs.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_generated_items
actions.description: List generated ElevenLabs history items with pagination and optional voice filtering.

pageSize.description: The maximum number of history items to return.

voiceId.description: Filter history items by voice ID.

startAfterHistoryItemId.description: The history item ID to continue pagination after.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

voiceId.description: The voice identifier used for generation.

modelId.description: The model identifier used for generation.

voiceName.description: The voice name used for generation.

voiceCategory.description: The voice category used for generation.

text.description: The input text that was synthesized.

dateUnix.description: The Unix timestamp when the history item was created.

characterCountChangeFrom.description: The input character count before processing.

settings.description: The synthesis settings used for the generation.

inaccurateClone.description: Whether the feedback reports an inaccurate clone.

audioQuality.description: Whether the feedback mentions audio quality.

other.description: Whether the feedback mentions other issues.

feedback.description: The feedback attached to a history item.

hasMore.description: Whether additional history items are available.

anyOf.description: The pagination cursor for the next page.

scannedUntil.description: The Unix timestamp until which the scan completed.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_history_item_by_id
actions.description: Get one ElevenLabs history item by history item ID without downloading its audio.

historyItemId.description: The history item ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

voiceId.description: The voice identifier used for generation.

modelId.description: The model identifier used for generation.

voiceName.description: The voice name used for generation.

voiceCategory.description: The voice category used for generation.

text.description: The input text that was synthesized.

dateUnix.description: The Unix timestamp when the history item was created.

characterCountChangeFrom.description: The input character count before processing.

settings.description: The synthesis settings used for the generation.

inaccurateClone.description: Whether the feedback reports an inaccurate clone.

audioQuality.description: Whether the feedback mentions audio quality.

other.description: Whether the feedback mentions other issues.

feedback.description: The feedback attached to a history item.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_models
actions.description: List the available ElevenLabs models and their text-to-speech capabilities.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this action.

items.description: A language supported by an ElevenLabs model.

canBeFinetuned.description: Whether the model can be finetuned.

canDoVoiceConversion.description: Whether the model supports voice conversion.

canUseStyle.description: Whether the model supports style control.

canUseSpeakerBoost.description: Whether the model supports speaker boost.

servesProVoices.description: Whether the model serves professional voices.

tokenCostFactor.description: The token cost factor for the model.

maxCharactersRequestFreeUser.description: The maximum request length for free users.

maxCharactersRequestSubscribedUser.description: The maximum request length for subscribed users.

maximumTextLengthPerRequest.description: The maximum text length per request.

modelRates.description: The pricing information for the model.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_user_info
actions.description: Get the current ElevenLabs user profile together with the embedded subscription snapshot.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this action.

createdAt.description: The Unix timestamp when the user was created.

canUseDelayedPaymentMethods.description: Whether delayed payment methods are available.

isOnboardingChecklistCompleted.description: Whether the onboarding checklist is completed.

isApiKeyHashed.description: Whether the API key is stored in hashed form.

canExtendCharacterLimit.description: Whether the character limit can be extended.

allowedToExtendCharacterLimit.description: Whether the user is currently allowed to extend the character limit.

nextCharacterCountResetUnix.description: The Unix timestamp of the next character count reset.

maxVoiceAddEdits.description: The maximum allowed voice add/edit operations.

voiceAddEditCounter.description: The number of used voice add/edit operations.

canExtendVoiceLimit.description: Whether the voice limit can be extended.

canUseInstantVoiceCloning.description: Whether instant voice cloning is enabled.

canUseProfessionalVoiceCloning.description: Whether professional voice cloning is enabled.

canUseDelayedPaymentMethods.description: Whether delayed payment methods are available.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_user_subscription_info
actions.description: Get the current ElevenLabs subscription details for the authenticated user.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this action.

canExtendCharacterLimit.description: Whether the character limit can be extended.

allowedToExtendCharacterLimit.description: Whether the user is currently allowed to extend the character limit.

nextCharacterCountResetUnix.description: The Unix timestamp of the next character count reset.

maxVoiceAddEdits.description: The maximum allowed voice add/edit operations.

voiceAddEditCounter.description: The number of used voice add/edit operations.

canExtendVoiceLimit.description: Whether the voice limit can be extended.

canUseInstantVoiceCloning.description: Whether instant voice cloning is enabled.

canUseProfessionalVoiceCloning.description: Whether professional voice cloning is enabled.

canUseDelayedPaymentMethods.description: Whether delayed payment methods are available.

nextPaymentAttemptUnix.description: The Unix timestamp of the next payment attempt.

discountAmountOff.description: The discount amount applied to the invoice.

discountPercentOff.description: The discount percentage applied to the invoice.

discounts.description: The discounts applied to the invoice.

taxCents.description: The invoice tax amount in cents.

nextPaymentAttemptUnix.description: The Unix timestamp of the next payment attempt.

discountAmountOff.description: The discount amount applied to the invoice.

discountPercentOff.description: The discount percentage applied to the invoice.

discounts.description: The discounts applied to the invoice.

taxCents.description: The invoice tax amount in cents.

timestampSeconds.description: The Unix timestamp when the change takes effect.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_voice
actions.description: Get one ElevenLabs voice by voice ID, with optional settings included.

withSettings.description: Whether the response should include voice settings.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

labels.description: The custom labels on the voice.

availableForTiers.description: The subscription tiers that can access the voice.

modelId.description: The model identifier for the language.

items.description: A verified language supported by a voice.

verifiedLanguages.description: The verified languages supported by the voice.

permissionOnResource.description: The permission level on the voice resource.

isOwner.description: Whether the current user owns the voice.

isLegacy.description: Whether the voice is a legacy voice.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_voice_settings
actions.description: Get the synthesis settings configured for one ElevenLabs voice.

voiceId.description: The voice ID whose settings should be retrieved.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

settings.description: The voice settings returned by ElevenLabs.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_voices
actions.description: List the available ElevenLabs voices with their key metadata and settings.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this action.

labels.description: The custom labels on the voice.

availableForTiers.description: The subscription tiers that can access the voice.

modelId.description: The model identifier for the language.

items.description: A verified language supported by a voice.

verifiedLanguages.description: The verified languages supported by the voice.

permissionOnResource.description: The permission level on the voice resource.

isOwner.description: Whether the current user owns the voice.

isLegacy.description: Whether the voice is a legacy voice.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: search_voices
actions.description: Search ElevenLabs voices with v2 pagination, filtering, sorting, and optional total count.

search.description: Search voices by name, description, labels, or category.

category.description: The voice category to filter by.

voiceType.description: The voice type to filter by.

sort.description: The field used to sort voices.

sortDirection.description: The direction used to sort results.

fineTuningState.description: The voice fine-tuning state to filter by.

voiceIds.description: The voice IDs to look up.

pageSize.description: The maximum number of voices to return.

nextPageToken.description: The pagination token returned by the previous response.

includeTotalCount.description: Whether to include the total count in the response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

labels.description: The custom labels on the voice.

availableForTiers.description: The subscription tiers that can access the voice.

modelId.description: The model identifier for the language.

items.description: A verified language supported by a voice.

verifiedLanguages.description: The verified languages supported by the voice.

permissionOnResource.description: The permission level on the voice resource.

isOwner.description: Whether the current user owns the voice.

isLegacy.description: Whether the voice is a legacy voice.

voices.description: The voices returned by the search.

hasMore.description: Whether more voices are available after this page.

nextPageToken.description: The pagination token for the next request.

totalCount.description: The total number of matching voices when requested.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: text_to_speech
actions.description: Generate speech audio from text by calling ElevenLabs text-to-speech and uploading the binary result to connector transit storage.

voiceId.description: The voice ID to use for synthesis.

modelId.description: The model ID to use for synthesis.

outputFormat.description: The output audio format. ElevenLabs formats are named as codec_sample_rate_bitrate, such as mp3_44100_128.

useSpeakerBoost.description: Whether speaker boost should be enabled.

voiceSettings.description: The voice settings overrides for synthesis.

pronunciationDictionaryLocators.description: The pronunciation dictionary locators to apply.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the uploaded file.

downloadUrl.description: The local transit URL for downloading the uploaded file.

sizeBytes.description: The uploaded file size in bytes.

file.description: A downloadable file uploaded to local transit storage.

voiceId.description: The voice ID used for synthesis.

modelId.description: The model ID used for synthesis.

contentType.description: The response content type from ElevenLabs.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: text_to_speech_with_timestamps
actions.description: Generate speech audio with character-level timing, upload the audio to connector transit storage, and return timing metadata.

voiceId.description: The voice ID to use for synthesis.

modelId.description: The model ID to use for synthesis.

outputFormat.description: The output audio format. ElevenLabs formats are named as codec_sample_rate_bitrate, such as mp3_44100_128.

useSpeakerBoost.description: Whether speaker boost should be enabled.

voiceSettings.description: The voice settings overrides for synthesis.

pronunciationDictionaryLocators.description: The pronunciation dictionary locators to apply.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the uploaded file.

downloadUrl.description: The local transit URL for downloading the uploaded file.

sizeBytes.description: The uploaded file size in bytes.

file.description: A downloadable file uploaded to local transit storage.

items.description: One character start time in seconds.

characterStartTimesSeconds.description: The start time in seconds for each character.

items.description: One character end time in seconds.

characterEndTimesSeconds.description: The end time in seconds for each character.

anyOf.description: Character-level timing information for generated audio.

items.description: One character start time in seconds.

characterStartTimesSeconds.description: The start time in seconds for each character.

items.description: One character end time in seconds.

characterEndTimesSeconds.description: The end time in seconds for each character.

anyOf.description: Character-level timing information for generated audio.

voiceId.description: The voice ID used for synthesis.

modelId.description: The model ID used for synthesis.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.
